overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a rainy cyberpunk city at dusk. The character moves along wet sidewalks past futuristic vehicles and towering glass buildings, briefly taking shelter under a building overhang before continuing toward a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city sidewalk with graffiti-covered wall and overhead pedestrian bridge

events.description: character rises from sitting against the wall and begins walking down the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character stands up from the graffiti-covered wall and starts walking steadily down the wet sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: metal walkway structure spanning across the street above
tall wall with black graffiti and brown tiles
tall street light illuminating the rainy scene

segments.scene_description: The video opens with a view of a rain-soaked city sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead. At around 6 seconds, a character rises from sitting against the wall and begins walking forward as the camera follows in third-person view.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with futuristic glass towers and overhead walkways

events.description: green sports car drives past on the wet multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk away from the camera, passing various vehicles and modern buildings

notable_agents.action: green sports car speeding past on the wet road

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade
large illuminated advertisement screen on building
row of trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the exposed sidewalk through the downtown area, passing modern glass office towers and digital billboards. A green sports car speeds past on the wet street around the 20-second mark as the character approaches a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered building entrance with concrete columns and stairs

events.description: character walks under the building overhang into the sheltered entrance area
character turns around and walks back toward the street exit

agents.ego_description: enters the covered building entrance, pauses near other pedestrians, then turns and walks back out toward the street

notable_agents.action: security guard or worker in yellow helmet standing near the entrance stairs

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing shelter from the rain
large support pillars holding up the building overhang
wide staircase leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character ducks under a building overhang to escape the rain, entering a sheltered entrance area with concrete columns and stairs. After briefly observing the surroundings and passing a security guard, the character turns around and walks back out toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with traffic lights and large digital displays

events.description: exits the sheltered building area back to the exposed sidewalk
approaches intersection with red traffic light and waiting vehicles

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the busy sidewalk toward an intersection, passing other pedestrians and futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit crossing the sidewalk while holding an umbrella

entered.detail: tall traffic signal showing red light
massive illuminated advertisement screen displaying neon graphics
marked pedestrian crossing at the street intersection

segments.scene_description: Back in the rain, the character walks along the busy sidewalk toward a major intersection. The scene features large digital billboards, a red traffic light, and moderate pedestrian traffic. The character approaches the crosswalk as futuristic vehicles wait at the light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from a quiet alleyway to a bustling urban intersection. It begins beside a graffiti-covered wall where a character rises and starts walking forward, passing under a pedestrian bridge as the camera trails behind. As the character moves deeper into the downtown area, the scenery opens up to reveal towering glass office buildings and glowing digital billboards, with a green sports car speeding past on the wet asphalt. The camera then follows the character as they duck under a sheltered building overhang to escape the rain, passing concrete columns and a security guard before turning back toward the elements. Finally, the scene expands into a wide, busy street filled with pedestrian traffic and futuristic vehicles waiting at a red light beneath the glare of massive electronic displays.
